detail: Selected accession 0001193125-16-696911 (SC 14D-9) as the anchor filing because it provided the strongest chronology section under deterministic scoring.
Recorded Sanofi's April 15 unsolicited acquisition letter as both bidder_sale and proposal because the priced bid triggered the sale process and the bid terms also belong in proposal rows.
Recorded target_sale med_e11 as 2016-06-21 with date_precision=approximate because the board meetings establishing the controlled process occurred on June 21 and 22, 2016.

Recorded NDA events med_e16-med_e19 for Company 1-4 as 2016-07-13 with date_precision=approximate because the filing identifies the four labels as the non-Pfizer NDA counterparties but does not map them to the exact signer dates within the June 29 to July 13 window.
Recorded final_round_inf_ann med_e20 as 2016-07-19 with date_precision=approximate because the process letters were sent on July 19 and 20, 2016.

Inferred Sanofi dropout on 2016-08-20 because Sanofi entered the July 5 confidentiality and standstill agreement but does not appear among the later Interested Parties or any subsequent bid rounds, and Medivation executed with Pfizer on August 20, 2016.
Proposal med_e33 matched multiple classification signals post_final_round_announcement, merger_agreement_draft, indication_or_range; priority cascade selected post_final_round_announcement.
